data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. PAW TONELLI finds it hard to break through. Has hit the frame the last two runs, the latest when second (17.01) at this track. Comes through a solid form race last start. Sure to be about the mark. 8. EXTREME DASH turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at Ballarat over 390m behind Hudson Hawk (22.95) in a T3 RSTW. Placed at his previous run. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from four starts. Has the ability to give this a shake. 2. THERMAL SMOKE had been racing well prior to her last start fourth at Bendigo following a T3 Grade 7 win three back with a third placing. Can hit the frame this time. 1. PARIS MASH surprised many with a win last start and can measure up again.","runners":[3,8,2,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: HEALESVILLE-R3-Fav Out
